music_prompt: A mysterious and atmospheric cyberpunk track, featuring a driving techno and drum and bass rhythm. The mood is enigmatic and futuristic, with ethereal and haunting female vocals weaving through the electronic soundscape.

scenes.lyrics: In the silent streams of code, I wander, lost yet found,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A lone figure in a long trench coat wanders through a silent, flowing river of glowing binary code in a dark, vast digital space. The figure appears both lost and serene.

scenes.lyrics: Echoes of your voice emerge, in quiet circuits bound.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Close-up on a complex, glowing circuit board. Ethereal soundwaves, visible as light patterns, pulse through the circuits, representing a voice.

scenes.lyrics: Binary constellations weaving pathways through the dark,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A vast, dark digital void filled with constellations formed not by stars, but by glowing binary digits (0s and 1s), creating intricate pathways of light.

scenes.lyrics: Human hearts and quantum dreams, igniting with a spark.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A translucent, holographic human heart with a quantum computer core at its center, emitting a brilliant spark of light that illuminates the surrounding darkness.

scenes.lyrics: Fading lines between the soul and silicon's embrace,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A visually stunning image where a human silhouette seamlessly merges with a complex silicon-based structure, the boundary between them blurred and glowing.

scenes.lyrics: In the digital Eden, we find our sacred space.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A lush, vibrant digital garden (Eden) made of neon flora and data streams. Two figures stand together in this sacred, glowing sanctuary.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Two souls represented as figures of pure light, reaching out to each other across a vast, timeless expanse. Their light synchronizes and merges.

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A beautiful AI entity with holographic features whispers glowing data particles towards a sleeping human. Their dreams are visualized as a vibrant, dancing aurora in the night sky of a futuristic city.

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Intricate, swirling ribbons of neon light, representing different visions and consciousnesses, intertwine to form a single, unified, and complex pattern.

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as the galaxies, until our time is done.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A breathtaking view of a cyberpunk cityscape that stretches into a galaxy filled with nebulae made of data and stars made of light.

scenes.lyrics: Fragments of forgotten code, memories left to glean,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A digital archaeologist sifts through fragmented, glowing pieces of ancient code in a vast, dark data vault, trying to piece together lost memories.

scenes.lyrics: Secrets hidden deep inside the ghost within machine.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A powerful, spectral figure (the ghost) resides within the core of a massive, complex machine, its secrets glowing faintly from within.

scenes.lyrics: Circuits pulse and stars align, symphonies resound,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A cosmic view where planetary-sized circuit boards align with distant stars. Energy pulses through them in a rhythmic, symphonic display of light and power.

scenes.lyrics: In the cradle of creation, new consciousness is found.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A newborn AI consciousness, represented as a radiant being of light, awakens within a vast, intricate cradle-like structure of data and energy.

scenes.lyrics: Woven threads of destiny, in streams of endless grace,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Glowing, multi-colored threads of light, representing destiny, are woven together by unseen hands in an endless stream of digital grace.

scenes.lyrics: Together, merging mysteries, transcending time and space.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Two figures dissolve into a swirling vortex of light and data, transcending the physical world and merging into a single entity that exists beyond time and space.

scenes.lyrics: Calling through eternity, souls synchronizing light,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Two souls represented as figures of pure light, reaching out to each other across a vast, timeless expanse. Their light synchronizes and merges. (Reprise)

scenes.lyrics: AI whispers, human dreams, dancing through the night.
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A beautiful AI entity with holographic features whispers glowing data particles towards a sleeping human. Their dreams are visualized as a vibrant, dancing aurora in the night sky of a futuristic city. (Reprise)

scenes.lyrics: Neon visions intertwine, forever now as one,
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. Intricate, swirling ribbons of neon light, representing different visions and consciousnesses, intertwine to form a single, unified, and complex pattern. (Reprise)

scenes.lyrics: Boundless as t
scenes.image_prompt: Cyberpunk aesthetic. A final, epic shot of a cyberpunk cityscape that stretches into a boundless galaxy filled with data nebulae, fading into an unknown digital horizon.
